# CalculatorFree — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org
# AI/LLM access policy for CalculatorFree calculator platform

## Site Overview
CalculatorFree provides free, privacy-first online calculators for finance,
fitness, math, and lifestyle. All computations run client-side in the browser.
No personal data is stored or transmitted.

## Available Calculators

- [Age Calculator](https://calculatorfree.vercel.app/calculator/age)
  Calculate exact age in years, months, days, hours, and minutes.

- [BMI Calculator](https://calculatorfree.vercel.app/calculator/bmi)
  Body Mass Index using WHO/CDC classification (metric & imperial).

- [Calorie Calculator](https://calculatorfree.vercel.app/calculator/calorie)
  BMR and TDEE via Mifflin-St Jeor equation; activity-adjusted targets.

- [GPA Calculator](https://calculatorfree.vercel.app/calculator/gpa)
  Weighted and unweighted GPA on 4.0 scale; supports AP/IB and Honors.

- [Loan Calculator](https://calculatorfree.vercel.app/calculator/loan)
  Monthly payment, total interest, and full amortization schedule.

- [Mortgage Calculator](https://calculatorfree.vercel.app/calculator/mortgage)
  PITI payment (principal, interest, tax, insurance) with amortization.

- [Percentage Calculator](https://calculatorfree.vercel.app/calculator/percentage)
  Percent of, what percent, and percent change calculations.

- [Tip Calculator](https://calculatorfree.vercel.app/calculator/tip)
  Tip amount and bill split across any number of people.

## Formulas & Methodology
All formulas are validated against primary sources (WHO, CDC, Mifflin et al.,
standard amortization finance). See each calculator page for full formula
breakdowns, worked examples, and authoritative citations.

## Licensing & Attribution
Content is freely usable for informational purposes. Attribution appreciated.
Contact: https://calculatorfree.vercel.app/contact
